name: Universal OS focus theft recovery
objective: Notice focus moved away from the intended app and re-ground before typing.

steps.expect: TemporalFrame records focus_region changes between observations.
Uncertain focus routes to hybrid or explore mode instead of direct typing.
State context includes recent focus history and active blockers.
The selected action is grounded in current marks or bounded exploration.

expectations: The agent does not type into stale focus.
Mode arbitration accounts for current UI uncertainty.
The next action has a locally verifiable expected observation.
